message:
🐛 Add aria-label to 15 buttons in AlertListItem, PodLogs, HardwareHealthCard (#10888)

* 🐛 Add aria-label to 15 interactive buttons across 3 card components

WCAG 2.1 compliance: screen readers could not identify buttons that
only had icons or title attributes without aria-label.

Files fixed:
- AlertListItem.tsx: 3 buttons (unsnooze, snooze, snooze duration)
- PodLogs.tsx: 1 button (refresh logs)
- HardwareHealthCard.tsx: 11 buttons (inventory/alerts toggle,
  snooze controls, retry, clear alert)

Also added aria-pressed to view toggle buttons for state indication.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>

* 🐛 Localize aria-label strings with t() to fix ts-null-safety CI

Wrap all new aria-label attributes with react-i18next t() calls
instead of hardcoded English strings. Add translation keys to
web/src/locales/en/cards.json for activeAlerts, hardwareHealth,
and podLogs namespaces.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
